prop_77.proof_body:
intro hsorted
induction xs with
| nil =>
    simp [insort]
| cons y ys ih =>
    simp [insort] at *
    cases hsorted with
    | nil =>
        simp [insort]
    | cons hxy hys =>
        by_cases h : x ≤ y
        · simp [insort, h, hxy, hys]
        · simp [insort, h, hxy, hys, ih hys]

prop_78.proof_body:
induction xs with
| nil =>
    simp [sort, sorted]
| cons x xs ih =>
    simp [sort, sorted, ih]

prop_85.proof_body:
induction xs generalizing ys with
| nil =>
    intro h
    cases h
    simp
| cons x xs ih =>
    intro h
    cases ys with
    | nil =>
        cases h
    | cons y ys =>
        simp at h
        simp [zip', reverse, ih ys h]

prop_57.proof_body:
induction n generalizing m xs with
| zero =>
    simp
| succ n ih =>
    induction m generalizing xs with
    | zero =>
        simp
    | succ m ihm =>
        cases xs <;> simp [ih, ihm]
